title: Mizuno16Craft: Ore texture
description: Texture change for the ores of various mods to fit Mizuno's Craft 16
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/views/UCt7ogppIpcAeXy_PSZi77-g?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mizuno16craft-productive-bees)[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/306155360589447178?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&link=https://discord.gg/QKKUV2SBqc)](https://discord.gg/wqw5zCE) _(Spanish server/Servidor Español)_

A simple change to the ore textures, so that it doesn't feel so different from [Mizuno 16 Craft Resource pack.](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/mizunos-16-craft-cit.html)

### Current compatibilities:
- Tinkers' Construct
- RFTools Base
- Werewolves
- EvilCraft
- Oreganized
- Create
